CUT TO:
INT. HOTEL SUITE - HALLWAY -
NIGHT
They march down the hotel hallway, Reynolds and Alma . He pounds
on the door to the suite. The nanny Tippy answers the door;
TIPPY
Hello,
Mr. Woodcock. What is it?

Tippy, I would like the dress back.

Ms. Rose
is sleeping.

Can you please go and get it for me?

ALMA
I know that.
CYRIL
I would advise you against this, Alma.

Because
he doesn't like surprises.

he

If you're looking for

perhaps you can think of something else.
This may be disruptive, no matter what you'r e

He stares her down. He is angry.
REYNOLDS
Is it because you think I don't need you ?
ALMA
yes.
REYNOLDS
I don't, Alma --
ALMA
That's very predictable of you. why do
you act so tough? I know you're not.
REYNOLDS
You're right. you're right. if I don't
protect myself - intruders will come in

corner of the room and ask me about their
fucking Asparagus.

Don't be a bully. you're a bully.
and you're loved by me, not cursed.
REYNOLDS
ENOUGH OF THE FUCKING CURSE.
this
in your head?!? I have
I'd like to do with my time.

I don't ever want to be without you.

I love you too
REYNOLDS
I have things I want to do.
I had thought my days were unlimited.
The mistakes I've made and made again can no
longer be ignored.
There are things nagging at me. Things
that now must be done.
Things that I simply cannot do without you,
to keep my sour heart from choking.
To break a curse.
A house that doesn't change, is a dead house.
Alma. Will You Marry
Me?
ALMA
( she says nothing . .. )
REYNOLDS
... Will
You Marry Me ... ?
